scope: decoder only; no full-model, generator, or vLLM work

target_path.implementation: TP4 attention plus EP4 gate-selected top-4 experts

final_default.decode_collective: two persistent-buffer BF16 width-sharded L1 minimal async all-reduces
final_default.interlayer_residual: replicated BF16 TILE DRAM [1,1,S,2880], with no inter-layer collective
final_default.expert_execution: exactly three sparse matmuls over gate-selected active experts
final_default.expert_output_memory: L1 for decode and internally padded prefill M<=32; DRAM for prefill M>=64

authoritative_performance.protocol: 20 warmed prefill iterations; 500 replays of captured decode trace

correctness_and_stress.real_weight_lengths: logs/final_precision_after_l1_policy.junit.xml: 8 passed across S=17,128,129,2048 and both layer kinds
correctness_and_stress.boundary_and_long_trace: logs/final_long_watcher_clean.junit.xml: 4 passed at positions 127-131 and trace/cache banks 128-131,191-193
correctness_and_stress.runtime_fallback_audit: logs/final_static_contract_audit_after_remediation.junit.xml: 3 static checks passed; logs/final_throw_on_fallback_hardware.junit.xml: both selected real-weight S=17 layer paths passed with throw_exception_on_fallback=true
correctness_and_stress.final_watcher: logs/final_watcher_after_review2.junit.xml: 4 passed at positions 127-131 and trace/cache banks 128-131,191-193

profiler.actionable_advice: Decode reports use exact critical rank-local EP activity. Prefill sparse modeling is omitted because scalar active-experts cannot represent token/rank variation; exact histograms are retained. DRAM sharding, L1 placement, K/subblock geometry, and fidelity advice have candidate evidence.

candidate_families.topology_and_collectives: README.md Operation-topology audit resolution plus candidate_rs_ag_pad64_*, candidate_fused_o_ag_*, candidate_fused_mm_rs_*, candidate_fused_o_rs_*, candidate_fused_o_rs_deferred_*, candidate_carried_residual_*, and candidate_prefill_async_ar_*
candidate_families.persistent_buffers: selected decode minimal AR plus off-default carried/fused/prefill async candidates; logs/minimal_all_reduce_config.json enumerates API knobs and non-exposed fields

stage_review: stage_review.md: clean-pass; no required work, concerns, or hard-check gaps
